stakeholder.business-owner.title: Business Owner
stakeholder.business-owner.description: Represents business goals, funding, and expected outcomes for the API initiative.
stakeholder.api-program-owner.title: API Program Owner
stakeholder.api-program-owner.descriptio: Coordinates API portfolio practices, organizational alignment, and long-term API capability development.
stakeholder.api-product-owner.title: API Product Owner
stakeholder.api-product-owner.descriptio: Drives the API opportunity, prioritization, and product-level decisions across the lifecycle.
stakeholder.domain-expert.title: Domain Expert
stakeholder.domain-expert.description: Brings deep knowledge of the business domain, concepts, rules, and constraints the API must reflect.
stakeholder.customer-or-partner-represen: Contributes the business customer or partner perspective for the journey, value, and collaboration model.
Represents the needs of developers, integrators, or other API consumers who use the API directly.
stakeholder.platform-architect.title: Platform Architect
stakeholder.platform-architect.descripti: Guides platform, integration, scalability, and architecture decisions that shape how the API is built and operated.
stakeholder.api-designer.title: API Designer
stakeholder.api-designer.description: Shapes the API contract, interaction model, consistency, and usability of the exposed capabilities.
stakeholder.delivery-engineer.title: Delivery Engineer
stakeholder.delivery-engineer.descriptio: Owns implementation, automation, testing, and release flow concerns needed to deliver the API reliably.
stakeholder.security-specialist.title: Security Specialist
stakeholder.security-specialist.descript: Ensures security risks, controls, and trust boundaries are addressed throughout the API lifecycle.
Clarifies legal, privacy, regulatory, and contractual requirements that affect the API.
stakeholder.governance-owner.title: API Governance Owner
stakeholder.governance-owner.description: Represents review, audit, and organization-wide governance practices for API quality and conformity.
stakeholder.documentation-devrel-owner.d: Owns onboarding content, developer communication, and documentation quality for API consumers.
stakeholder.support-operations-owner.des: Represents runtime support, incident handling, observability, and operational readiness.
stakeholder.partner-vendor-manager.title: Partner or Vendor Manager
stakeholder.partner-vendor-manager.descr: Coordinates external partner, supplier, or vendor relationships that influence API strategy and delivery.
